subcodes.title: Words spoken in Jun. 1911 in Egypt
subcodes.first_line: If one friend feels love for another he will wish to say so. Though he knows that the friend is aware… If there be no love, if there be no pleasure or spiritual enjoyment in prayer, do not pray
subcodes.subjects: @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer, @importance of prayer, @love of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
